_comment: TEST: TikTok — Video post. During TESTING phase: privacy is SELF_ONLY (private). In production: change to PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE or MUTUAL_CAN_VIEW.
_testing_note: Keep privacy=SELF_ONLY until TikTok Dev app approval. After approval, change to PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE for normal user posting.
